autoPicker253.text: Select schema method × All Core airline airplane airport animal autoIncrement book chemicalElement color commerce company database datatype date finance food git hacker image internet language literal location lorem music number person phone string system unit vehicle word Faker Recently used autoIncrement.sequence Generates an incrementing sequence. Values only advance when a generated row is accepted, so constraint-filtered rows do not consume sequence numbers. domain autoIncrement.sequence Generates an incrementing sequence. Values only advance when a generated row is accepted, so constraint-filtered rows do not consume sequence numbers. Schema: awd.domain.autoIncrement.sequence() Parameter Details Name Details start Starting integer in the sequence. Defaults to 1. Example: 10 step Non-zero amount added after each accepted row. Defaults to 1. Example: 5 prefix Optional text added before the numeric portion. Example: filename suffix Optional text added after the numeric portion. Example: .txt zeropadding Total digit width for the numeric portion. A value of 3 renders 1 as 001, while 100 stays 100. Defaults to 0. Example: 3 Parameter Types Name Type Req start integer optional step integer optional prefix string optional suffix string optional zeropadding integer optional Usage Examples Shows autoIncrement.sequence in use. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: Leave blank Full call: autoIncrement.sequence() Returns: 1 Shows autoIncrement.sequence in use. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (start=10, step=5) Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(start=10, step=5) Returns: 10 Shows autoIncrement.sequence in use. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (start=1, step=5, prefix="filename", suffix=".txt", zeropadding=3) Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(start=1, step=5, prefix="filename", suffix=".txt", zeropadding=3) Returns: filename001.txt Shows autoIncrement.sequence using start. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (start=10) Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(start=10) Returns: 10 Shows autoIncrement.sequence using step. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (step=5) Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(step=5) Returns: 1 Shows autoIncrement.sequence using prefix. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (prefix="filename") Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(prefix="filename") Returns: filename1 Shows autoIncrement.sequence using suffix. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (suffix=".txt") Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(suffix=".txt") Returns: 1.txt Shows autoIncrement.sequence using zeropadding. Command: autoIncrement.sequence Params field: (zeropadding=3) Full call: autoIncrement.sequence(zeropadding=3) Returns: 001 Open documentation Cancel Apply
